campaign: Male squat-rack low-res lip-sync wiring commercial
purpose: Build reusable low-cost audio and Flow wiring components outside ElevenLabs Flows, then import only approved components into the canvas for low-res lip-sync proof.

assetPolicy.draftResolution: Use the lowest practical review resolution, preferably 720p or lower.
assetPolicy.filenameRule: Generated review assets must use immutable timestamped filenames.
assetPolicy.sourceOfTruth: This manifest, the continuity plates, and the script storyboard JSON are the durable source before the Flow canvas.
assetPolicy.noSecrets: Do not store ElevenLabs API keys or signed temporary URLs in this repo.
assetPolicy.finalGate: No upscale, final grade, premium video model, or professional final render until low-res wiring is approved.

characters.label: Character A - Dark-Haired Fit Gym Friend
characters.role: Disciplined friend with the simple meal-prep system.
characters.lookLock: Dark wavy hair, tan skin, clean jawline, lean muscular build, black tank, black shorts, white socks and trainers, thin chain.

voice.label: Roger - Laid-Back, Casual, Resonant
voice.direction: Warm low-to-mid male voice, natural gym-buddy tone, casual and practical, not polished or salesy.

characters.label: Character B - Dirty-Blond Strength Gym Friend
characters.role: Relatable stressed friend trying to stay consistent.
characters.lookLock: Short curly dirty-blond hair, light stubble, sturdy athletic build, gray shirt, olive shorts, black smartwatch, white socks and trainers.

voice.label: Chris - Charming, Down-to-Earth
voice.direction: Medium-deep male voice, grounded gym friend energy, slightly raw and real, not announcer-like.

lines.text: Work's nonstop. Budget cuts, boss on me... I'm barely keeping up.
How do you stay consistent? You're busier than me.
Meal Prep Revolution. Best switch I made.
I pick meals online, check out, and they show up at my door.
No shopping, cooking, or cleanup. I heat one up and get back to work.
Clean ingredients, macro-friendly, keeps me on track.

flowsImport.proofModel: lowest-cost lip-sync/video model available in Flow
flowsImport.rule: Create one TTS node per line, wire that exact audio into one matching low-res lip-sync/video node, and regenerate failed lines individually.
